targets.rawSql:
SELECT timestamp AS "time", power AS value, meter_id FROM energy_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND ('$meter_id' <> '' AND meter_id = '$meter_id')
UNION ALL
SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', timestamp) AS "time", AVG(power) AS value, NULL::text AS meter_id FROM energy_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND ('$meter_id' = '') GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', timestamp) AS "time", SUM(energy) AS value FROM energy_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', timestamp) ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('day', timestamp);
SELECT time_bucket('1 day', timestamp) AS "time", AVG(power) AS value FROM energy_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY time_bucket('1 day', timestamp) ORDER BY 1;

SELECT SUBSTRING(meter_id FROM 1 FOR 1) AS region, DATE_TRUNC('month', timestamp) AS month, SUM(energy) AS total_energy FROM energy_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY region, month ORDER BY month, region;

SELECT h.hypertable_name, pg_size_pretty(hypertable_size(format('%I', h.hypertable_name)::regclass)) AS size, c.chunk_count FROM (SELECT hypertable_name FROM timescaledb_information.hypertables) h LEFT JOIN (SELECT hypertable_name, COUNT(*) AS chunk_count FROM timescaledb_information.chunks GROUP BY hypertable_name) c USING (hypertable_name);
SELECT query_id, AVG(execution_ms) AS avg_ms, MIN(execution_ms) AS min_ms, MAX(execution_ms) AS max_ms FROM bench.continuous_aggregates GROUP BY query_id ORDER BY avg_ms DESC;
